guest.title: Welcome to VANESSA
guest.description: Sign in or create an account to start using your AI mission console.

authenticated.title: Welcome back
authenticated.description: You are signed in as {{username}}. Open your profile, control panel, or Vanessa AI workspace.

control.title: Control panel for {{username}}
control.description: Use your role-based control surface to manage account tools, approvals, models, and operations.

profile.title: Profile and settings
profile.description: Review your account details and personalize the interface.

models.description: Manage model credentials, registered models, and allowed capabilities.

approvals.description: Review and activate pending user accounts.

quotes.title: Quote management
quotes.description: Search, review, edit, and add quote-of-the-day entries.

systemHealth.title: System health
systemHealth.description: Inspect the live status of VANESSA services and architecture.

ai.title: Vanessa AI
ai.description: Open AI-powered workflows and keep your chat workspace organized under a dedicated section.

chat.title: Chat workspace
chat.description: Start or continue a model-backed conversation in the Vanessa AI console.

quoteOfTheDay.title: Quote of the day

quoteAdmin.description: Review the quote catalog, filter entries, edit records, and add new ones.

editor.selectPrompt: Select a quote from the list or create a new one.

admin.description: Manage approval workflows and account activation.

superadmin.title: Superadmin settings
superadmin.description: Access platform-level controls and design resources.

user.title: User settings
user.description: Manage your account preferences and personal workspace access.

personalization.title: Personalization
personalization.description: Configure how the interface appears and behaves for your account.

theme.title: Theme personalization
theme.description: Switch between day and night mode and choose theme colors.

runtime.title: Runtime profile
runtime.description: Controls the platform-wide runtime mode used for safety gates and tool access.
runtime.restrictionMessage: Only superadmins can change the runtime profile.

navigation.title: Settings navigation
navigation.description: Use canonical settings and control routes instead of hidden subpages.

navigation.title: Model access
navigation.description: Manage your provider credentials and register models available to your account.

credentials.title: Provider credentials
credentials.description: Register API credentials for external model providers. API keys are masked after save.

modelsHub.title: Model management
modelsHub.description: Manage your credentials, register accessible models, and review what is available to your account.
modelsHub.superadminDescription: Manage personal model access plus platform catalog, assignments, discovery, and download workflows.

models.title: Model catalog management
models.subtitle: Manage catalog entries and role-based model assignments.

catalog.title: Catalog operations
catalog.description: Add models to the platform catalog.

discovery.description: Search and inspect open models before downloading them to local storage.

jobs.description: Track asynchronous download progress and failures.

assignments.title: Model assignments
assignments.description: Assign available models to each role scope.
